scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/modules/event dist/modules/registration dist/modules/checkin dist/idempotency && cp src/modules/event/schema.sql dist/modules/event/ && cp src/modules/registration/schema.sql dist/modules/registration/ && cp src/modules/checkin/schema.sql dist/modules/checkin/ && cp src/idempotency/schema.sql dist/idempotency/
